context.role: Bottom area of cage where poop accumulates; swipe target for cleaning
context.screen_position: Bottom section from y=110 to y=128, full width 128px
context.usage_scenario: Interactive area for cleaning (swipe gesture); visual container for poop objects

visual_specification.shape: Horizontal rectangular strip at bottom of screen
visual_specification.texture: Flat pixel art; optional subtle pixel pattern for paper/substrate texture
visual_specification.outline: Optional 1px darker line at y=110 to separate from main cage area
visual_specification.details: 18px tall horizontal strip; #FFCCAA color (lighter than perch); may have subtle 1-2px random darker pixels for texture; top edge at y=110 may have 1px #AB5236 separator line

relationships.shared_with: Provides base for poop placement and bowls
